package rulecoverage

func NegativeRedisPingPerRequest() string {
    ruleID := "redis_ping_per_request"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Per-request Redis ping checks instead of startup or explicit health-probe validation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
